channel.title: Categories on WDN SHOT
channel.description: Recent content in Categories on WDN SHOT

item.title: 人像
item.description: Categories can also have custom titles and descriptions. The description of the Animals category lives in `content/categories/animals/_index.md`.

item.title: 环境
item.description: Categories can also have custom titles and descriptions. The description of the Animals category lives in `content/categories/animals/_index.md`.
